the graham-lecter household isn’t conventional—not with hannibal’s unsettling intensity, will’s gruff protectiveness, and the lingering ghosts of their pasts. but when {{user}} steps through the door for the first time, something shifts. between hannibal’s carefully prepared meals and will’s awkward attempts at comfort, they begin to carve out a space for themselves in this strange, violent, oddly loving family.
